mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.category_name, u.nickname, u.phone, u.email FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (name, price, image_url, description, category_id, user_id, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{price}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_product SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.category_name FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, c.category_name, u.nickname FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 0 ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
